groups.name: Input Stem
groups.description: Stem block using Swish activation.

groups.name: MBConv Block 1a
groups.description: MBConv bottleneck: 1x1 expand → 3x3 dwconv → SE → 1x1 projection.

groups.name: MBConv Block 1b
groups.description: MBConv bottleneck: 1x1 expand → 3x3 dwconv → SE → 1x1 projection.

groups.name: MBConv Block 2a
groups.description: MBConv bottleneck: 1x1 expand → 3x3 dwconv → SE → 1x1 projection.

groups.name: MBConv Block 2b
groups.description: MBConv bottleneck: 1x1 expand → 3x3 dwconv → SE → 1x1 projection.

groups.name: MBConv Block 2c
groups.description: MBConv bottleneck: 1x1 expand → 3x3 dwconv → SE → 1x1 projection.

groups.name: MBConv Block 3a
